name: Plan Mode
description: Enter Plan Mode correctly (#LetsPlanIt) — switch to HIGH thinking for the plan, build a plan with Acceptance Criteria + Audit Method columns and CHECKPOINT markers per the FORGE pipeline shape, and confirm the thinking-level switch back to MEDIUM on approval.
origin: GV2 WS-B batch 2 — converted from hookify `intent-plan-mode` (a dumb context-injector, event:prompt used only to inject guidance, not to detect a violation) by SHINOB1 sub-seat shinob1-build-wsb-atlas-skill
format_note: Structured to mirror Skill #001 (case-drive-checklist) and the ratified pilot (atlas-consult, PR #56) — SKILL.md + gates.md + surface.html + skill.json, per HIKARI-confirmed WS-C reconciliation (2026-07-08): the tooling-enforced 4-file _RPI_STANDARDS/skills/ shape is canonical for fleet-registered skills, distinct from RAIDEN's single-file docs/warriors/raiden/skills/ convention used for warrior-specific verify runbooks.
